scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend-go,frontend -c blue,green "powershell -NoProfile -Command \"Set-Location 'backend-go'; $env:GOCACHE = Join-Path (Resolve-Path '..').Path '.local-cache\\go-build'; [void](New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $env:GOCACHE); ..\\.local-tools\\go\\bin\\go.exe run ./cmd/server\"" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --open"
